# Documentation Update: issue-76

Documentation changes were required because installer behavior and prerequisites changed.

## Updated

- `README.md`: replaced the external ECC dependency section with vendored Claude Code agent documentation and attribution.
- `docs/agents-source.md`: added pinned upstream source, license attribution, vendored file table, and refresh procedure.
- Command docs under `commands/` and GitLab command copies: replaced user-facing "Invoke ECC" wording with "Invoke the Claude Code agent" where the installed vendored agents are meant.
- Fast-path skills: replaced "No ECC implementation agent" with "No Claude Code implementation agent."
